violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. White cutting board in produce area has deep gauges and black. No longer has cleanable surface.--Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Deli Department by rotisserie chicken station has tape on counter tops as repair and a broken pull out drawer.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not stored in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items *. Wasp Killer, 409, WD-40, and other cleaners stored on small shelf above produce prep sink system back of store.
